Golden Retriever.description: Friendly, reliable, and trustworthy. One of the most popular family dogs.

Labrador.description: Outgoing, even-tempered, and gentle. Excellent with children and other pets.

Cavalier King Charles.description: Affectionate, graceful, and gentle. Loves cuddles and adapts to apartment life.

Beagle.description: Merry, curious, and friendly. Great with kids and loves to explore.

Border Collie.description: Highly intelligent and intensely energetic. Needs a job to do and lots of exercise.

Husky.description: Striking looks and a free-spirited personality. Needs heavy exercise and space.

Shih Tzu.description: Outgoing and happy. Thrives in apartments and loves to be pampered.
Shih Tzu.grooming: Daily brushing or regular grooming appointments
